message:
fix: remove remaining dirty tracking refs in new upstream files (woho.4)

Post-rebase cleanup for files added by upstream: import_engine.go
(ClearAllExportHashes), sync_export.go (ClearDirtyIssuesByID/SetExportHash),
sync_status.go (GetDirtyIssues), sync_helpers.go (SetExportHash),
delete.go (markIssuesDirtyTx).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
